title.rendered: 23 Fundraising & Marketing Reports for Nonprofit Professionals Worldwide

content.rendered:
The reports listed below are a small sampling of the research available to nonprofits, NGOs, and charities worldwide. The data can be used to help your organization craft your next online fundraising and marketing plan.

If you would like to suggest a specific report be added to the list, please contact Heather Mansfield. Most of the reports listed are based on U.S. nonprofit research. Nonprofit Tech for Good is eager to learn about, add, and promote similar reports from other countries/regions of the world.

For Nonprofits Worldwide:

1. 2019 Global NGO Technology Report :: Download
Published by Funraise and Nonprofit Tech for Good

2. 2019 World Giving Index :: Download
Published by the Charities Aid Foundation

3. 2018 Global Trends in Giving Report :: Download
Published by the Public Interest Registry and Nonprofit Tech for Good

4. Global Landscape of Philanthropy Report 2018 :: Download
Published by the Worldwide Initiatives for Grantmaker Support (WINGS)

For Nonprofits in the United States:

5. 2019 Benchmarks Study :: Download
Published by M+R

6. 2019 Digital Outlook Report :: Download
Published by Care2, NTEN, hjc, and the Resource Alliance

7. Women Give 2019 :: Download
Published by the Lily Family School of Philanthropy

8. 2019 Nonprofit Communications Trends Report :: Download
Published by Nonprofit Marketing Guide

9. Social Media Use 2019 :: Download
Published by the Pew Internet & American Life Project

10. Giving USA 2019 :: Download
Published by the Giving USA Foundation

11. 2018 Charitable Giving Report :: Download
Published by the Blackbaud Institute

12. Why America Gives 2018 :: Download
Published by Classy

13. Future of Philanthropy Report 2018 :: Download
Published by Fidelity Charitable

14. 2018 Fundraising Effectiveness Project :: Download
Published by the Association of Fundraising Professionals

 

For Nonprofits in Canada:

15. The Giving Report 2018 :: Download
Published by CanadaHelps

16. 2018 Canada’s Charitable Sector :: Download
Published by the Canada Revenue Agency

For Nonprofits in Asia Pacific:

17. Australia Giving Report 2019 :: Download
Published by Good2Give

18. Digital Technology in the Non-for-Profit Sector :: Download
Published by Infoxchange (Australia & New Zealand)

19. Charitable Giving in Asia Pacific 2015 :: Download
Published by MasterCard

For Nonprofits in Europe:

20. Charity Digital Skills Report 2019 :: Download
Published by Skills Platform

21. The Charity Digital Spectrum 2019 :: Download
Published by Tech Trust

22. La place du numérique dans le projet associatif en 2019 :: Téléchargez
Publié par Solidatech

For Nonprofits in Latin America:

23. La Tecnología las OSC de América Latina 2016 :: Download
Published by Wingu

For Nonprofits in the Middle East and Africa:

24. Arab Giving Survey 2016 :: Download
Published by Philanthropy Age
